textPlain:
Today my collaborator and I are releasing issinrealtime.org, a multimedia project that plays back every day onboard the ISS. Feedback welcomed.Here's an article that was just released about it: https://www.collectspace.com/news/news-102725a-iss-in-real-t...I also wrote a "making of" post about it here:
https://benfeist.com/posts/iss-in-real-time/
Awesome work! Surely a huge labor of love to dig up that much content out of the public domain. Congrats on the launch!
